text:
On Thu, 10 Aug 2000 12:18:55 +0100, Josef Karthauser wrote:

> It appears to be a bug in XFree86-4.0.1, and a patch around the
> problem was proposed by Sascha Blank <sblank@addcom.de> in message
> Id <20000718172452.A8300@ally.blank.de>.  We've tried the patch
> here and it does indeed fix the problem.

That's quite unlikely, given that the originator is using 3.3.6. :-)

Ciao,
Sheldon.
